segments.text: I will exalt you, Lord, for you lifted me out of the depths and did not let my enemies gloat over me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Lord my God, I called to you for help, and you healed me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You, Lord, brought me up from the realm of the dead; you spared me from going down to the pit.
Sing the praises of the Lord, you his faithful people; praise his holy name.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For his anger lasts only a moment, but his favor lasts a lifetime; weeping may stay for the night, but rejoicing comes in the morning.
Lord, when you favored me, you made my royal mountain stand firm; but when you hid your face, I was dismayed.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: To you, Lord, I called; to the Lord I cried for mercy:
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: What is gained if I am silenced, if I go down to the pit? Will the dust praise you? Will it proclaim your faithfulness?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Hear, Lord, and be merciful to me; Lord, be my help.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You turned my wailing into dancing; you removed my sackcloth and clothed me with joy,
that my heart may sing your praises and not be silent. Lord my God, I will praise you forever.
segments.speaker: David
